title: ajuga chamaepitys subsp. ciliata
intro: Ajuga chamaepitys subsp. ciliata, also known as blue bugle, is a flowering plant species within the genus Ajuga. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of blue bugle include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Blue bugle can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
